patches.summary: ParseGraphResponse surfaces per-subrequest Salesforce error detail (errorCode + message) when a composite graph fails.
patches.reason: Customized org schemas (e.g. Account without AnnualRevenue) fail the whole graph; the opaque 'was not successful' made the failure undiagnosable from CLI output. Live-verify finding F-021.
patches.validated_outcome: TestParseGraphResponseSurfacesNodeErrors asserts the error carries graph id, node, HTTP status, errorCode, and message.

patches.summary: trust register falls through to the CMDT path on INVALID_FIELD / 'No such column', not just INVALID_TYPE / NOT_FOUND.
patches.reason: Tooling API v63.0 dropped Certificate.CertificateData; the Certificate POST 400 short-circuited registration even though the CMDT fallback works. Live-verify finding F-022.
patches.validated_outcome: TestRegisterFallsBackToCMDTOnCertificateSchemaDrift reproduces the live error body and asserts source=cmdt.

patches.summary: live-verify.sh and the runbook query data.db, the SQLite file the CLI actually writes.
patches.reason: The script queried sf360.db (zero-byte, no tables) so checks 4 and 6 always failed. Live-verify finding F-023.

patches.summary: SKILL.md / README recipes pass --org after the subcommand, and not at all to sign-plan / execute-plan.
patches.reason: --org is declared per agent subcommand, not at root; leading placement broke verify-skill command resolution, and sign-plan / execute-plan resolve the org from SF360_ORG and reject the flag at runtime.
